data.title: Where Are You Waiting GIF by This GIF Is Haunted
data.alt_text: Digital illustration gif. We slow pan towards the top half of what looks like a science class skeleton sitting awkwardly upright in a grassy field, eyeballs filled in with white irises and black pupils looking straight at us, a broad grin and full set of teeth stretching across its face. Text appears with the question, "Well? Where you at?'
